ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "anomaly_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly type */,
  "noise_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the noise type */,
  "labeled_anomaly_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of labeled anomalies in the dataset */,
  "noise_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of noise in the dataset */,
  "apply_data_scaling" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if data scaling was applied */,
  "scaler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scaler used */,
  "apply_data_rebalancing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if data rebalancing was applied */,
  "rebalance_pipeline_id" TEXT /* Details of the rebalance pipeline used */,
  "apply_missing_data_filling" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if missing data filling was applied */,
  "fill_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the missing data filling algorithm used */,
  "apply_dimensionality_reduction" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if dimensionality reduction was applied */,
  "dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dimensionality reduction algorithm used */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the experiment */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score of the experiment */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score of the experiment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the experiment */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the experiment */,
  "exception" TEXT /* Exception details if any */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_fill_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("fill_algorithm_id") REFERENCES fill_algorithms ("fill_algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_noise_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("noise_type_id") REFERENCES noise_types ("noise_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_anomaly_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_type_id") REFERENCES anomaly_types ("anomaly_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id") REFERENCES dimensionality_reduction_algorithms ("dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_scaler_id FOREIGN KEY ("scaler_id") REFERENCES scalers ("scaler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "target_variable" TEXT /* Name of the target variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., tabular, image, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_types" (
  "anomaly_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly type */,
  "anomaly_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the anomaly type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "noise_types" (
  "noise_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each noise type */,
  "noise_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the noise type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the noise type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the noise type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noise_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scalers" (
  "scaler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaler */,
  "scaler_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaler */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scaler */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the scaler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fill_algorithms" (
  "fill_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing data filling algorithm */,
  "fill_algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the missing data filling algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the missing data filling algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the missing data filling algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fill_algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensionality_reduction_algorithms" (
  "dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimensionality reduction algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the dimensionality reduction algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dimensionality reduction algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the dimensionality reduction algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimensionality_reduction_algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebalance_pipelines" (
  "rebalance_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebalance pipeline */,
  "pipeline_steps" TEXT /* Steps involved in the rebalance pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rebalance pipeline */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the rebalance pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebalance_pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
